allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process -Name 'com.docker.backend','Docker Desktop' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name,CPU,WorkingSet | Format-Table -AutoSize" 2>&1)
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process -Name 'docker' | Select-Object Id,Name,CPU | Format-Table; Stop-Process -Name 'docker' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host 'Done'" 2>&1)

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process -Name 'docker','docker-compose' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; Write-Host 'Killed'; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Get-Process -Name 'docker' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id,Name")
